name: Pooled Financing Election for 501(c)(3) Organizations

eligibility.description: 95% of proceeds must be used for loans to two or more 501(c)(3) organizations or governmental units, with specific demand survey and disbursement timelines.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an issuer to elect a special maturity rule for pooled financing of 501(c)(3) organizations, facilitating access to lower-cost tax-exempt debt.
